mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, name, category, address, rating, ST_X(geom) AS longitude, ST_Y(geom) AS latitude FROM restaurants WHERE ST_Contains(ST_GeomFromGeoJSON(#{geoJson}), geom)
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO restaurants (user_id, name, category, address, rating, geom) VALUES (#{userId}, #{name}, #{category}, #{address}, #{rating}, ST_SetSRID(ST_MakePoint(#{longitude}, #{latitude}), 4326))
mapper.update: UPDATE restaurants SET name = #{name}, category = #{category}, address = #{address}, rating = #{rating}, geom = ST_SetSRID(ST_MakePoint(#{longitude}, #{latitude}), 4326), updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM restaurants WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, name, category, address, rating, ST_X(geom) AS longitude, ST_Y(geom) AS latitude FROM restaurants WHERE id = #{id}
